title: search — retention windows
description: Four independent retention concerns. Sync jobs + analytics events are tier-based per plan. Indexes + synonyms + saved queries are tenant-managed — no auto-purge (they represent live configuration, not history). Analytics events are high-cardinality + hot-purged aggressively. Physical index versions retained for a grace window after alias swap.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 25 (data protection by design — hashing over raw retention)

purge.action: auto-transition to cancelled with cancel_reason = 'stalled', emit SearchSyncJobCancelled

purge.notes: High-cardinality — short plan gets aggressive 30d purge. `query_hash` aggregate rollups (top_queries table — v2) survive longer via daily materialisation.

purge.action: NULL out the `query` column (preserves query_hash for aggregation). Independent of the row-level retention above.
purge.notes: Raw query text is confidential PII. Even when the row is retained for aggregate analytics, the raw text is nulled after 7d. Aggregation continues to work via query_hash.

purge.trigger: tenant admin removes searchable attribute + reindex to remove OR TenantErased event
purge.action: soft delete via SoftDeletes trait; deleted_at set. Physical engine index dropped by PurgeIndexModelJob (see below). Ledger row hard-deleted 30d after soft-delete.

purge.trigger: SearchIndex.deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at < now() - 7d OR post-alias-swap old version (older than swap_grace_days)
purge.notes: 7d grace after alias swap so a rollback is always possible. TenantErased skips the grace — immediate drop.

purge.trigger: tenant admin deletes OR TenantErased event
purge.action: soft delete; hard delete 365d after soft-delete via PruneSearchAnalyticsJob. Platform-seeded rows (is_system=true) can only be disabled — not deleted — by tenant admins.

purge.trigger: user deletes OR UserErased event OR TenantErased event
purge.action: soft delete; hard delete 365d after soft-delete. Shared queries owned by an erased user transfer ownership to a tenant admin before the soft-delete.
immediate hard delete of every search_* row for the tenant via FK cascade. PurgeIndexModelJob dispatched with tenantScope + force=true to drop physical engine indexes without the 7d grace.

Null SearchAnalyticsEvent.user_id. Cascade SearchSavedQuery owner_id: shared queries transferred to a tenant admin, private queries soft-deleted. SearchSyncJob.causer_id anonymised (row retained as operational evidence).

tier_assignment.description: retention_tier column on both SearchSyncJob and SearchAnalyticsEvent set at row creation. Precedence: explicit config override > tenant plan default > global config default.

swap_grace.description: After a successful alias swap, the previous physical index is retained for `config('search.retention.swap_grace_days')` (default 7d) before PurgeIndexModelJob drops it. Enables one-click rollback of a failed reindex.

query_text_scrub.description: SearchAnalyticsEvent.query is nulled after `config('search.retention.query_text_days')` (default 7d) even if the row is retained longer for aggregation. Independent GDPR guardrail.
